results.rendered_html:
aviṣaya a.
1 Unperceived, invisible, beyond the reach of the senses.
2 Insensible.
3 Disregarding objects of sense; ˚manasāṃ yatīnāṃ  M. 1. 1. 
— yaḥ
1 Absence, disappearance; raveraviṣaye kiṃ na pradīpasya prakāśanaṃ  H. 2. 79. 
2 Not an object of (anything), not within the reach of, beyond, transcending; na kaściddhīmatāmaviṣayo nāma  Ś. 4 ; sakalavacanānāmaviṣayaḥ  Māl. 1. 30  beyond the reach (power) of words; saumitrerapi patriṇāmaviṣaye tatra priye kvāsi bhoḥ  U. 3. 45. 
3 Disregard of the objects of sense.
